color.background.page: The page canvas behind all content — the calm reading-room surface. Use for the app background; cards sit on top of it.
color.background.card: Card and panel surfaces — the white containers holding charts, tables and summaries. Use for cards, panels, modals. Pair text with foreground/primary.
color.background.input: Fill for text inputs, selects and the CSV import dropzone. Pair with border/default and foreground/primary.
color.background.elevated: Fill for floating surfaces — dropdowns, popovers, chart tooltips. Elevation comes from elevation/medium shadow, not colour.
color.background.alt-row: Alternating (zebra) row fill in dense transaction tables to aid horizontal scanning. Use on every other row.
color.background.hover: Hover fill for interactive rows and cells in tables and lists. Pointer-driven surface only.
color.background.inverse: Dark fill for inverted surfaces — dark tooltips, high-contrast callouts. Pair with foreground/inverse.
color.background.brand: Solid brand fill for brand moments (e.g. selected nav, brand banner). Identity, not "positive". Pair with foreground/on-brand.
color.background.brand-subtle: Tinted brand fill for subtle brand tags, selected chips, active filter pills. Pair with foreground/brand.
color.background.action: Primary button fill. Pushed to teal/600 for a safe AA contrast (6.2:1) with white label text. Pair with foreground/on-action.
color.background.action-hover: Hover state for the primary button. Pair with foreground/on-action.
color.background.action-pressed: Pressed/active state for the primary button. Distinguish from hover via state/elevation.
color.background.success-subtle: Tinted fill for positive banners and confirmations (e.g. "Import merged"). Pair with foreground/success.
color.background.warning-subtle: Tinted fill for caution banners (e.g. near a budget threshold). Pair with foreground/warning.
color.background.error-subtle: Tinted fill for error banners and validation failures (e.g. CSV parse error). Pair with foreground/error.
color.background.info-subtle: Tinted fill for informational notices. Pair with foreground/info.
color.background.estimate-subtle: Tinted fill for projection areas — confidence bands and forecast regions in charts. Marks estimate, not fact. Always paired with a dashed/patterned treatment.
color.background.disabled: Fill for disabled controls and surfaces. Pair with foreground/disabled.
color.foreground.primary: Primary text — transaction descriptions, amounts, body copy, headings. 13.6:1 on background/card (AAA). The default text colour.
color.foreground.secondary: Secondary text — supporting labels, column headers, captions that still need to read clearly. 7.9:1 on card (AAA).
color.foreground.tertiary: Tertiary text — axis labels, metadata, timestamps, helper text. 5.3:1 on card, passes AA for small text. Use sparingly in dense areas.
color.foreground.disabled: Disabled text and icons only. ~2.7:1 — below AA by design, exempt as disabled UI. Never use for active content.
color.foreground.on-action: Label text on the primary button (background/action). White on teal/600 = 6.2:1 (AA). Pair only with background/action and -hover/-pressed.
color.foreground.on-brand: Text/icons on solid brand fill (background/brand). Pair with background/brand.
color.foreground.inverse: Text on dark/inverse surfaces (background/inverse) — dark tooltips, callouts. 16.9:1 (AAA).
color.foreground.brand: Brand-coloured text and links on light surfaces. teal/700 = 6.9:1 on card (AA). Use for links and brand emphasis, not large fills.
color.foreground.success: Positive text — "on track", under-budget, up-trend labels, success messages. green/700 = 6.3:1 on card; 5.6:1 on background/success-subtle (AA).
color.foreground.warning: Caution text — near-threshold notices, warning messages. amber/700 = 7.4:1 on card (AA). Supportive tone, not alarming.
color.foreground.error: Error text — over-budget, down-trend, validation failures, CSV parse errors. red/700 = 8.0:1 on card; 6.1:1 on background/error-subtle (AA).
color.foreground.info: Informational text — neutral notices and tips. blue/700 = 7.0:1 on card (AA).
color.foreground.estimate: Text marking projected/estimated figures — forecast values, projection labels. estimate/600 = 6.0:1 on card (AA). Keeps estimate visually distinct from recorded fact.
color.border.subtle: Lightest divider — row separators in tables, hairline splits between sections. Quiet, for dense layouts.
color.border.default: Standard border — card outlines, input borders, the default edge. Use unless a softer or stronger edge is needed.
color.border.strong: Emphasised border — stronger separators, hovered input outline. More presence than border/default.
color.border.focus: Focus ring colour for keyboard navigation. Always paired with an offset/outline, never colour alone (accessibility).
color.border.brand: Brand-coloured edge — selected cards, active brand outlines.
color.border.success: Edge for positive states — success banner border, valid input confirmation.
color.border.warning: Edge for caution states — warning banner border, near-threshold outline.
color.border.error: Edge for error states — error banner border, invalid input outline.
color.border.info: Edge for informational states — info banner border.
color.border.estimate: Edge for projection regions — dashed outline of forecast/confidence bands. Marks estimate vs fact.
color.accent.brand: Brand indicator fill — active nav dot, brand icon fill, selection ring. Identity, not "positive".
color.accent.success: Positive indicator — up-trend arrow fill, "on track" dot. Pair with a label/icon, never colour alone.
color.accent.warning: Caution indicator — near-threshold dot, warning icon fill.
color.accent.error: Negative indicator — down-trend arrow, over-budget dot, error icon fill.
color.accent.info: Informational indicator — info icon fill, neutral notice dot.
color.accent.estimate: Projection indicator — forecast series swatch, estimate legend dot. Always with a dashed/patterned treatment and label.
color.accent.category-groceries: Groceries spending category — legend swatch, chart series, category dot. Always with the groceries icon + label (colour never alone).
color.accent.category-transport: Transport spending category — legend swatch, chart series, category dot. Always with the transport icon + label.
color.accent.category-dining: Dining spending category — legend swatch, chart series, category dot. Always with the dining icon + label.
color.accent.category-subscriptions: Subscriptions spending category — legend swatch, chart series, category dot. Always with the subscriptions icon + label.
color.accent.category-shopping: Shopping spending category — legend swatch, chart series, category dot. Always with the shopping icon + label.
color.accent.category-health: Health spending category — legend swatch, chart series, category dot. Kept distinct from groceries teal. Always with the health icon + label.
color.accent.category-housing: Housing spending category — legend swatch, chart series, category dot. Always with the housing icon + label.
color.accent.category-other: Other/uncategorised spending — legend swatch, chart series, category dot. Neutral grey. Always with a label.
color.background.category-groceries-subt: Fondo tenue del badge groceries. Coppia con foreground/category-groceries per il testo. Sempre con icona groceries (colore mai da solo, principio 5).
color.foreground.category-groceries: Testo e icona del badge groceries su background/category-groceries-subtle (AA).
color.background.category-transport-subt: Fondo tenue del badge transport. Coppia con foreground/category-transport per il testo. Sempre con icona transport (colore mai da solo, principio 5).
color.foreground.category-transport: Testo e icona del badge transport su background/category-transport-subtle (AA).
color.background.category-dining-subtle: Fondo tenue del badge dining. Coppia con foreground/category-dining per il testo. Sempre con icona dining (colore mai da solo, principio 5).
color.foreground.category-dining: Testo e icona del badge dining su background/category-dining-subtle (AA).
color.background.category-subscriptions-: Fondo tenue del badge subscriptions. Coppia con foreground/category-subscriptions per il testo. Sempre con icona subscriptions (colore mai da solo, principio 5).
color.foreground.category-subscriptions: Testo e icona del badge subscriptions su background/category-subscriptions-subtle (AA).
color.background.category-shopping-subtl: Fondo tenue del badge shopping. Coppia con foreground/category-shopping per il testo. Sempre con icona shopping (colore mai da solo, principio 5).
color.foreground.category-shopping: Testo e icona del badge shopping su background/category-shopping-subtle (AA).
color.background.category-health-subtle: Fondo tenue del badge health. Coppia con foreground/category-health per il testo. Sempre con icona health (colore mai da solo, principio 5).
color.foreground.category-health: Testo e icona del badge health su background/category-health-subtle (AA).
color.background.category-housing-subtle: Fondo tenue del badge housing. Coppia con foreground/category-housing per il testo. Sempre con icona housing (colore mai da solo, principio 5).
color.foreground.category-housing: Testo e icona del badge housing su background/category-housing-subtle (AA).
color.background.category-other-subtle: Fondo tenue del badge other. Coppia con foreground/category-other per il testo. Sempre con icona other (colore mai da solo, principio 5).
color.foreground.category-other: Testo e icona del badge other su background/category-other-subtle (AA).
color.accent.category-groceries-on-dark: Dot groceries sul chip filtro selezionato (fondo scuro). Mantiene il colore-categoria leggibile sullo scuro.
color.accent.category-transport-on-dark: Dot transport sul chip filtro selezionato (fondo scuro). Mantiene il colore-categoria leggibile sullo scuro.
color.accent.category-dining-on-dark: Dot dining sul chip filtro selezionato (fondo scuro). Mantiene il colore-categoria leggibile sullo scuro.
color.accent.category-subscriptions-on-d: Dot subscriptions sul chip filtro selezionato (fondo scuro). Mantiene il colore-categoria leggibile sullo scuro.
color.accent.category-shopping-on-dark: Dot shopping sul chip filtro selezionato (fondo scuro). Mantiene il colore-categoria leggibile sullo scuro.
color.accent.category-health-on-dark: Dot health sul chip filtro selezionato (fondo scuro). Mantiene il colore-categoria leggibile sullo scuro.
color.accent.category-housing-on-dark: Dot housing sul chip filtro selezionato (fondo scuro). Mantiene il colore-categoria leggibile sullo scuro.
color.accent.category-other-on-dark: Dot other sul chip filtro selezionato (fondo scuro). Mantiene il colore-categoria leggibile sullo scuro.
spacing.inline-gap: Tight gap inside compact components — icon-to-label, within a chip. 8px.
spacing.content-gap: Standard gap between elements within a group — form fields, stacked items. 16px.
spacing.component-padding: Internal padding of standard components — buttons, inputs, compact cards. 16px.
spacing.card-padding: Padding inside cards and panels. 24px — generous for the calm reading-room feel.
spacing.section-gap: Gap between major dashboard sections. 32px — lean generous per "calm, not crowded".
spacing.page-margin: Top-level page margin and sidebar-to-content separation. 64px.
radius.small: Subtle rounding — chips, tags, small buttons. 4px.
radius.large: Prominent rounding — modals, popovers, large panels. 12px.
radius.pill: Fully rounded — pills, badges, category tags. 999px.
